src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Replace single-threaded RelpConnection with a thread-safe connection pool to support concurrent access.
Update configuration dependency from RelpConfig to RelpConnectionConfig to align with new library API.
Add SSLContextSupplier parameter to constructor to support external SSL context management.
Change accept method signature to take RelpBatch instead of byte[] to delegate batching to caller.
Remove manual connection retry loops and sleep logic in favor of pool-managed connection lifecycle.
Remove explicit Codahale metrics counters and timers, delegating metrics to the connection factory.
Update copyright year range and project description in file header.
Add Javadoc comment describing the class as a thread-safe shareable output.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: /** Implementation of a shareable output. Required to be thread-safe. */

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Integrate SLF4J logging throughout the main application flow for observability.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added Logger instance and LOGGER.info calls for initialization, configuration, and lifecycle events.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Implement comprehensive metrics collection using Codahale Metrics, JMX, and Prometheus.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added MetricRegistry, JmxReporter, Slf4jReporter, and a Jetty server hosting PrometheusMetricsServlet.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Integrate a plugin-based architecture for processing events using PluginMap and MappedPluginFactories.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports and logic to initialize PluginMap, MappedPluginFactories, and WrappedPluginFactoryWithConfig.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Implement RELP connection pooling with support for TLS via Azure Key Vault or plain mode.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added logic to create UnboundPool with ManagedRelpConnectionWithMetricsFactory based on TLS config.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Replace DefaultAzureCredential with ManagedIdentityCredential for Azure authentication.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Replaced DefaultAzureCredentialBuilder with ManagedIdentityCredentialBuilder using clientId.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Update configuration object usage to use getter methods instead of public fields.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Changed azureConfig.blobStorageEndpoint to azureConfig.blobStorageEndpoint() and similar fields.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Switch EventProcessorClient from single event processing to batch processing.
Refactor the event consumer instantiation to support the new plugin and metrics architecture.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Replaced EventContextConsumer with EventBatchConsumer wrapping ParsedEventConsumer and DefaultOutput.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Ensure proper shutdown of metrics reporters and the Jetty server when the application stops.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added calls to jettyServer.stop(), slf4jReporter.stop(), and jmxReporter.stop() in the finally block.

Import the RelpBatch class required for the new interface signature.
Update the file header to reflect the new project name and extended copyright years.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use source and target 21 instead of 8.
Update maven-javadoc-plugin configuration to use source 21 instead of 8.
Add maven-enforcer-plugin rule to require Java version 21.
Update nlf_01 dependency from version 3.11.0 to 4.0.0.
Update rlp_01 dependency from version 3.0.1 to 5.0.0.
Replace Gson dependency with Jakarta JSON API and Parsson implementation.
Add httpcore5 dependency, likely required by updated Azure or other libraries.
Add azure-security-keyvault-jca dependency for client-side SSL support.
Update azure-messaging-eventhubs dependency from 5.15.0 to 5.21.3.
Update azure-messaging-eventhubs-checkpointstore-blob dependency from 1.16.1 to 1.21.5.
Update azure-identity dependency from 1.8.0 to 1.18.2.
Replace deprecated prometheus simpleclient dependencies with new prometheus-metrics instrumentation and exporter libraries.
Update Jetty dependency from jetty-servlet 10.0.15 to jetty-ee10-servlet 12.1.8 to support Jakarta EE 10.
Update JUnit Jupiter and Platform dependencies to version 6.0.3.
Update Log4j2 dependencies to version 2.25.4.
Update SLF4J API dependency from 2.0.7 to 2.0.17.
Add rlp_03 dependency for testing purposes.
Add rlo_06 dependency for testing purposes.
Add equalsverifier dependency for testing equality implementations.
Add akv_01 dependency, likely for Azure Key Vault integration.
Update metrics.version property from 4.2.8 to 4.2.38.
Add spotless-maven-plugin for code formatting and license header enforcement.
Update apache-rat-plugin configuration to exclude additional files like assembly and formatter configs.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to ban JUnit 4, ban dynamic versions, and require plugin versions.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add maven-checkstyle-plugin with extensive rules for code quality enforcement.
Add spotbugs-maven-plugin for static code analysis.
Replace maven-shade-plugin with maven-assembly-plugin for creating fat JARs.
Reorder maven-flatten-plugin executions to ensure clean happens before flatten.
Move distributionManagement block inside the publish-github-packages profile for cleaner structure.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin dependency version from 3.3.0 to 3.6.2.
